mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PW, AUTHORITY,MEMBER_DEL_FL PROFILE_IMG, ENROLL_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, SOCIAL_TYPE, SOCIAL_ID FROM "MEMBER" WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N' AND AUTHORITY = '3'
SELECT MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PW, AUTHORITY,MEMBER_DEL_FL, PROFILE_IMG, ENROLL_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, SOCIAL_TYPE, SOCIAL_ID FROM "MEMBER"
mapper.update: UPDATE "MEMBER" SET MEMBER_NAME = #{memberName}, MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail}, AUTHORITY = #{authority}, MEMBER_DEL_FL = #{memberDelFl} WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "MEMBER" ( MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PW, AUTHORITY, MEMBER_DEL_FL, ENROLL_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_MEMBER.NEXTVAL, #{memberEmail}, #{memberName}, #{memberPw}, #{authority}, #{memberDelFl}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
